qa_pairs.question: How can Co-Principal Investigators (Co-PIs) update their Canadian Common CV (CCV) for the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) application?
qa_pairs.answer: Co-PIs can update their CCVs on CCDB by clicking 'Update CCV' on the Resource Applications page, or by navigating to 'My Account → View Reporting'. Principal Investigators can also share the direct link `https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/reporting` with their Co-PIs.

qa_pairs.question: What happens in the RAC online application form when a Co-PI updates their Canadian Common CV (CCV)?
qa_pairs.answer: Once a Co-PI updates their CCV, its status will be automatically updated in the RAC online application form.

qa_pairs.question: Are deadline extensions granted for missing Canadian Common CVs (CCVs) in the RAC application process?
qa_pairs.answer: No, deadline extensions due to missing CCVs are not possible.

qa_pairs.question: What should applicants do to ensure their Canadian Common CV (CCV) is submitted on time?
qa_pairs.answer: Applicants should plan ahead to avoid delays or the risk of missing the submission deadline due to the Canadian Common CV requirement.
